name: moment-electron
description: MIUI 风格的好友圈桌面客户端

scripts.dev:electron: node -e "const { spawn } = require('child_process'); const s = spawn('npx', ['wait-on', 'http://localhost:5173'], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true }); s.on('exit', () => { spawn('npx', ['electron', '.'], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true }); });"
scripts.build:backend: cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt && python -m nuitka --standalone --onefile --windows-console-mode=disable --clang --output-dir=../dist-backend main.py
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm run build:backend && npx electron-builder --win
